description_long: This is a pair of low-top, lace-up sneakers with a predominantly light gray upper and dark brown outsoles. The shoes feature a smooth, matte finish with subtle perforations on the side panels for breathability and a stitched geometric pattern. The brand name 'ARNT' is printed on the outer side of each shoe, and a stylized ram's head logo is visible on the heel counter. The laces are white and arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, complementing the overall clean and modern design. The interior lining appears to be black, providing contrast to the lighter exterior.
description: A pair of light gray, low-top sneakers with white laces, dark brown soles, and subtle branding details including 'ARNT' and a ram's head logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toe box, white laces, and the symmetrical shape of both shoes.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlighting the 'ARNT' branding, perforations, and the geometric stitching on the outer side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ram's head logo on the heel counter and the black interior lining.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective similar to view 1, showing the branding, perforations, and stitching on the opposite shoe.
attribute_logo: A stylized ram's head in gray on the heel counter of each shoe.
